welcome.title: Welcome to MRNote
welcome.body: MRNote is a private notebook for independent consultants, freelancers, and solopreneurs. Every client gets a notebook. Every note you write feeds a memory the AI can recall later. Let's set up your first client in about a minute.
createNotebook.title: Create your first client notebook
createNotebook.body: One notebook per client or project. Don't overthink it — you can edit everything later.
createNotebook.clientName.label: Client or project name
createNotebook.whatTheyDo.label: What they do (optional)
pasteNote.title: Drop in a real note
pasteNote.body: Paste something messy — a meeting note, a Slack dump, a voice transcript. MRNote will turn it into structured memory you can actually find later.
pasteNote.label: Note content
pasteNote.placeholder: Sarah wants the growth audit by Oct 30. She mentioned their churn is 8% and they care about enterprise deals. She prefers weekly async Loom over meetings.
pasteNote.hint: Paste a real client conversation, email, or Slack thread — the messier the better.
memoryPreview.title: Here's what MRNote remembered
memoryPreview.body: These are the kinds of facts MRNote extracts from each note. Ask "What does Sarah care about?" weeks from now and you'll get these back.
memoryPreview.example1: Sarah prefers weekly async Loom over meetings.
memoryPreview.example2: Deadline for growth audit is October 30.
memoryPreview.example3: Their current churn is 8%; they prioritize enterprise deals.
memoryPreview.caption: MRNote remembered:
memoryPreview.subcaption: Every session can query, trace, and cite these memories.
memoryPreview.note: Full extraction runs in the background; this is a preview of what gets stored.
nextSteps.title: You're ready
nextSteps.body: Everything is set up. Here's what happens next:
nextSteps.item1: Weekly Monday digest — changes, pending items, and what each client is waiting on
nextSteps.item2: Relationship reminders — MRNote surfaces follow-ups before they fall through the cracks
nextSteps.item3: Instant search — ask anything about any client, anytime
nextSteps.item4: Upgrade to Pro for unlimited notebooks and advanced AI recall
